name: product-design
description: Product design suite: product-concept (discover product vision through guided search + multiple-choice dialogue), product-map (build product map), experience-map (map screens and exception states), use-case (generate use case tree, JSON for machines + Markdown for humans), feature-gap (detect feature gaps), feature-prune (optional manual — prune over-design), ui-design (generate UI design spec and role-based HTML preview from product map and experience map), design-audit (cross-layer consistency audit: trace / coverage / cross-check). 产品设计套件：产品概念发现、建立产品地图、体验地图、用例集（双格式）、功能查漏、功能剪枝（可选手动）、UI设计规格生成、设计审计（跨层一致性校验）。
